_comment: Copy to ~/.config/interviewstack-digest/config.json and edit. NO secrets here - the MCP key goes in the sibling 'env' file (chmod 600).
candidateProfile: REPLACE ME. One paragraph the model uses to judge fit. Include: your current role + years, your CORE strengths (what you actually do, not just tools), the roles/levels you TARGET, location/remote preference, and an explicit 'Not a fit:' clause for domains/levels you do NOT want. The more specific the 'not a fit', the fewer junk saves.

roles: REPLACE - canonical role name, e.g. Machine Learning Engineer
